prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约508→445→434→389→399名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），2021至2024年累计前移约119名，2025年小幅后移至399名，近两年在389–399区间窄幅波动；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为28人，2026年增至30人，较2025年扩招2人（+7.1%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响温和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位列第7名，属于全国顶尖高校（Top20），办学层次极高；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世，其曾为中科大少年班创立做出贡献）；2026年周期出现偏负面事件（师德师风相关），但整体舆情影响有限。抖音热度排名第12（高热），短视频平台关注度较高。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，A+学科包括数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等8个；A学科包括计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、工商管理；A-学科包括统计学、力学、信息与通信工程、仪器科学与技术、动力工程及工程热物理、地质学、环境科学与工程等7个。A-及以上共19个学科，学科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、电子信息、数学、物理等基础学科及新兴工科专业社会热度持续偏高；辽宁省2026年高考总报名约20万人，按近年物理类占比约71.5%估算，物理类考生约14.3万人，与2025年（143368人）基本持平，考生规模未出现明显变化。；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非辽宁省本地高校；该校在辽宁招生人数占全国总招生比例约2–3%（2025年约51人/全国约598人），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近年稳定在389–399区间、2026年小幅扩招2人（+7.1%）、学校层次极高且优势学科众多、考生规模基本持平、抖音热度较高等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次在2025年399名基础上略有后移（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约420名，区间372–468名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（信息智能与集成电路方向）
- 理科试验班类（数学与物理方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（化学与生物方向）
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（综合方向）
- 环境科学与工程类（部分年份招生）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（372–468名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<372名）可重点冲击一档的计算机/人工智能英才班或数理英才班；位次接近区间上限（>468名）建议以二档为主、三档稳妥保底。该校英才班培养体系突出，建议优先考虑含英才班名称的专业组。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 508 → 445 → 434 → 389 → 399, showing a fluctuating upward trend (smaller ranking number indicates increased competition). From 2021 to 2024, the ranking moved forward by about 119 places, with a slight backward shift to 399 in 2025, and narrow fluctuations within the 389–399 range in the last two years. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 28 students each year from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 30 students in 2026, an expansion of 2 students (+7.1%) compared to 2025. The expansion is limited and has a moderate impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026 consistently place it at 7th, making it a top national university (Top 20) with an extremely high academic level. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive (related to the passing of Li Zhengdao, who contributed to the establishment of USTC's Junior Class). In the 2026 cycle, a slightly negative event occurred (related to teacher ethics), but the overall public opinion impact was limited. Douyin popularity ranking: 12th (high heat), indicating high attention on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A+ disciplines include Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering, totaling 8. A disciplines include Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Business Administration. A- disciplines include Statistics, Mechanics, Information and Communication Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Geology, and Environmental Science and Engineering, totaling 7. There are 19 disciplines at A- or above, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength, which is highly attractive to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains high for basic disciplines and emerging engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, Mathematics, and Physics. In 2026, the total number of registrations for the Liaoning Province college entrance examination is approximately 200,000. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category students at about 71.5%, it is estimated that there are about 143,000 Physics Category examinees, roughly the same as in 2025 (143,368), with no significant change in the scale of examinees. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Liaoning Province. The number of students recruited in Liaoning accounts for about 2–3% of the total national enrollment (approximately 51 out of about 598 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical rankings in the 389–399 range in recent years, a slight expansion of 2 students (+7.1%) in 2026, the extremely high school level with numerous advantageous disciplines, the basically unchanged scale of examinees, and high Douyin popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to the 2025 ranking of 399 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 420, with a range of 372–468.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Intelligence and Integrated Circuit Direction)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology Direction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Comprehensive Direction)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Class (recruited in some years).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (372–468), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<372), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 Computer Science/AI Elite Class or Mathematics/Physics Elite Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>468), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors and use Tier 3 majors as a stable safety net. The university's Elite Class training system is outstanding, so it is recommended to prioritize major groups that include the Elite Class name.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
